hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json,sys,re,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','')
if re.search(r'project\.cli (discover|promote) run|project\.pipelines\.run_all', cmd):
    os.chdir('/home/irene/Edge')
    env={**os.environ,'PYTHONPATH':'.'}
    subprocess.run(['python3','project/scripts/update_results_index.py'],env=env,check=False)
    subprocess.run(['python3','project/scripts/update_reflections.py'],env=env,check=False)
" 2>/dev/null || true
